industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: HomeBiogas Ltd
summary: HomeBiogas LTD provides household biogas digester systems to convert household food scraps and animal manure into clean cooking gas and liquid fertilizer worldwide. The company offers HomeBiogas 2, a biogas system that recycles organic waste, as well as creates renewable energy; and HomeBiogas 2 and Bio-Toilet Kit, which is used to treat food waste and animal manure, and toilet waste. It also provides additional products, such as countertop biogas stoves, maintenance kits, built-in biogas stoves, filter kits, probiotic tablets, bio-toilets, and gas bags. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Beit Yanai, Israel.
